name: RatingIndicatorComponent
description: Set of fields of FormItemControl component

inputs.name: allowHalves
inputs.description: Whether or not to display half values.

inputs.name: ariaLabel
inputs.description: Sets the aria-label attribute to the element.

inputs.name: ariaLabelledBy
inputs.description: Sets the aria-labelledby attribute to the element.

inputs.name: ariaRoledescription
inputs.description: Sets the aria-roledescription attribute to the element.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description:
Input for disabled state from parent component.
Sets the aria-disabled attribute to the element.
Sets the is-disabled class to the element.

inputs.name: displayAllRatings
inputs.description: Whether or not to display the popover that shows the sum of each rating. Requires [ratings] object.

inputs.name: displayMode
inputs.description: Whether the rating indicator is in displayMode

inputs.name: dynamicTextIndicator
inputs.description: Text divider label between view value and indicator count.

inputs.name: nonInteractive
inputs.description: Whether the rating indicator is in non-interactive state.

inputs.name: ratedIcon
inputs.description: Icon class for rated icon from fundamental-styles lib https://sap.github.io/fundamental-styles/?path=/docs/components-icon--sizes

inputs.name: ratings
inputs.description:
Object containing key-value pairs where the key is the rating and the value is the total sum of those ratings.
Overrides totalRatings and ratingAverage.

inputs.name: showDynamicText
inputs.description:
Whether to display the dynamic text (rating value and count) after the rating indicator.
When false, only the star rating UI is shown without any text.

inputs.name: totalRatings
inputs.description: Total number of ratings. If provided, will display text showing the total number of ratings.

inputs.name: unratedIcon
inputs.description: Icon class for unrated icon from fundamental-styles lib https://sap.github.io/fundamental-styles/?path=/docs/components-icon--sizes

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: User's value number of ratings. If provided, Overrides ratingAverage.

outputs.name: ratingChanged
outputs.description: Fired when the user sets or changes their rating.
